case_title: LEONARDO MARTINEZ VS. FRANCISCO JAVIER SANDOVAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-01-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-13-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
